text.message: idc who it was. pick yourself
will probably block you all game
I got my block all game already
no need to solo block early game
it was the correct block though
he could have blocked the 9 wheat
and then he comes back and steals
im just trying to get to the next game. I have no chance. but have someone griefing already
then let him. why do you deserve it?
I couldnt have helped you anyways
